description: Kakao VX is a sports technology company focused on golf-related services, including screen golf, golf booking, smart golf course services, and golf course operations. Its public website presents company and consumer service information.
summary: No public developer integration surfaces found for kakaovx.com; searches and site inspection only surfaced corporate/product pages and privacy-policy references to internal/consumer-facing APIs, with no public API docs, specs, GraphQL, MCP, or CLI.
